{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Contact Centre Lead",
  "description": "Airtel Nigeria (Airtel Networks Limited) is a leading telecommunications services provider in Nigeria headquartered in Lagos, the commercial nerve-centre of Nigeria. The telco ranks amongst the top four mobile service providers in terms of subscribers with a customer base of more than 39.8 million. The company&#39;s product offerings include 2G, 3G and 4G wireless services, mobile commerce and enterprise services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Contact Centre Lead

Job Identification: 796
Job Location: Lagos
Job Schedule: Full time

About the Role


	The Contact Centre Lead is responsible for driving excellence in customer service delivery by ensuring consistent quality across all contact centre operations.
	The role focuses on enhancing frontline capabilities through effective training, quality assurance, and performance management, while leveraging data-driven insights to identify trends, resolve customer issues, and improve overall service experience.
	The incumbent also ensures efficient communication, optimal resource utilization, and strong collaboration with internal and external stakeholders to achieve high customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.


Responsibilities
Ensure frontlines&rsquo; skill development and delivery of consistent quality service:


	Monitor and manage partner agent&rsquo;s quality of service delivery by conducting remote random audits for Call Centre.&nbsp;
	Conduct random re-audits of partner QA audits to ascertain their actual adherence to Smartcash PSB&rsquo;s required quality audit process for Back Office, Outbound, Social Media, etc&nbsp;
	Provide feedback to management on products and services as well as issues affecting customers highlighted from quality monitoring process with a view to improving identified process gaps.&nbsp;
	Highlight specific trends identified in the Call Centres based on insight from sample audits to ensure the trends are effectively addressed.&nbsp;
	Follow-up and ensure resolution of customer issues identified during call audits.


Conduct remote random audits for new hires during On-the-Job-Training to determine training effectiveness:


	Conduct remote random audits for new hires during OJT for the Call Centre to determine training effectiveness as well as ensure agents are fit for the job.


Quality Process Management:


	Ensure all quality monitoring tools are modified to reflect the required parameters and weightages per LOB.
	Ensure quality feedback is given within specific timelines&nbsp;
	Monitor partner quality to ensure defined targets are met.&nbsp;
	Develop objectives for the call center&rsquo;s day-to-day activities


Communication Management (CCQA):


	Ensure that current and accurate information is sent to frontline on all updates, products and service offerings to ensure the required knowledge is imparted.&nbsp;
	Inform the front line on all planned and unplanned downtime to manage customers professionally during the period&nbsp;
	Ensure communication is clear and understandable


Training Management:


	Doubt clearing sessions with partner Trainers on products and services.&nbsp;
	Respond to mails related to training clarification and observations based on customer complaints.&nbsp;
	Identify training needs and ensure highlighted are covered within defined timelines.&nbsp;
	Contribute to training content to capture specific gaps.&nbsp;
	Review training nuggets circulated in the call centers to ensure that information is not misleading.


BPO Calibration:


	Conduct calibration sessions with BPO QA and Training to ascertain their understanding, interpretation and adherence in line with expected quality audit process.&nbsp;
	Ensure training partner adhere and deploy frontline training based on identified and signed-off training needs.


Coordinate scheduling, adherence and implementation of monthly job knowledge quiz:


	Coordinate scheduling, adherence and implementation of monthly Job Knowledge Quiz for frontline to continuously ascertain frontline skill/knowledge level.&nbsp;
	Prepare Job Knowledge Quiz questions and ensure accuracy


Focus Group Support:


	Ensure the BPO participates in the focus group sessions&nbsp;
	Escalate identified issues pending with Smartcash PSB&nbsp;
	Give feedback on identified issues


Provide intelligence for the creation, modification or cleanup of call tagging categories on the CRM tool:


	Provide intelligence for the creation and cleanup of call tagging categories on CRM tool through intelligence gathered from call audits and calibration process.


Analysis and feedback on top call drivers and repeat call drivers:


	Analysis and feedback on top call drivers and repeat call drivers through intelligence gathered from sample audits. Initiatives on how to reduce top call drivers and repeat calls.&nbsp;
	Engagement &amp; conversion of Inactive customers and agents


Weekly and Monthly Reports:


	Reports on quality audits.&nbsp;
	Top call drivers and cost analysis.
	Customer satisfaction report.
	Job knowledge quiz training need analysis
	Conducting effective resource planning and scheduling to maximize the productivity of resources (people, technology etc.)
	Retrieving of calls from ACR on demand for various analysis purposes.


Requirements
Educational Qualifications:


	B.A. or B.Sc in any discipline&nbsp;


Relevant Experience &amp; Functional / Technical Skills:


	Minimum of 5 years of Call Centre background in Banking/Telco/Service industry.
	Proficient in using customer service resolution tools (ACR, SV, ECMS, Maximus)&nbsp;
	Strong numeric ability
	Knowledge of performance evaluation and customer service metrics&nbsp;
	Strong Interpersonal Skills &amp; People Centric.&nbsp;
	Excellent organizational and leadership skills with a problem-solving ability&nbsp;
	Effective communication skills
",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-18",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-19",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "AIRTEL NIGERIA"
    
  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }

}



Contact Centre Lead Job at Airtel Nigeria




        
    

        
        Airtel Nigeria (Airtel Networks Limited) is a leading telecommunications services provider in Nigeria headquartered in Lagos, the commercial nerve-centre of Nigeria. The telco ranks amongst the top four mobile service providers in terms of subscribers with a customer base of more than 39.8 million. The company's product offerings include 2G, 3G and 4G wireless services, mobile commerce and enterprise services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Contact Centre Lead

Job Identification: 796
Job Location: Lagos
Job Schedule: Full time

About the Role
     

            
    




	The Contact Centre Lead is responsible for driving excellence in customer service delivery by ensuring consistent quality across all contact centre operations.
	The role focuses on enhancing frontline capabilities through effective training, quality assurance, and performance management, while leveraging data-driven insights to identify trends, resolve customer issues, and improve overall service experience.
	The incumbent also ensures efficient communication, optimal resource utilization, and strong collaboration with internal and external stakeholders to achieve high customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.


Responsibilities
Ensure frontlines’ skill development and delivery of consistent quality service:


	Monitor and manage partner agent’s quality of service delivery by conducting remote random audits for Call Centre. 
	Conduct random re-audits of partner QA audits to ascertain their actual adherence to Smartcash PSB’s required quality audit process for Back Office, Outbound, Social Media, etc 
	Provide feedback to management on products and services as well as issues affecting customers highlighted from quality monitoring process with a view to improving identified process gaps. 
	Highlight specific trends identified in the Call Centres based on insight from sample audits to ensure the trends are effectively addressed. 
	Follow-up and ensure resolution of customer issues identified during call audits.


Conduct remote random audits for new hires during On-the-Job-Training to determine training effectiveness:


	Conduct remote random audits for new hires during OJT for the Call Centre to determine training effectiveness as well as ensure agents are fit for the job.


Quality Process Management:


	Ensure all quality monitoring tools are modified to reflect the required parameters and weightages per LOB.
	Ensure quality feedback is given within specific timelines 
	Monitor partner quality to ensure defined targets are met. 
	Develop objectives for the call center’s day-to-day activities


Communication Management (CCQA):


	Ensure that current and accurate information is sent to frontline on all updates, products and service offerings to ensure the required knowledge is imparted. 
	Inform the front line on all planned and unplanned downtime to manage customers professionally during the period 
	Ensure communication is clear and understandable


Training Management:


	Doubt clearing sessions with partner Trainers on products and services. 
	Respond to mails related to training clarification and observations based on customer complaints. 
	Identify training needs and ensure highlighted are covered within defined timelines. 
	Contribute to training content to capture specific gaps. 
	Review training nuggets circulated in the call centers to ensure that information is not misleading.


BPO Calibration:


	Conduct calibration sessions with BPO QA and Training to ascertain their understanding, interpretation and adherence in line with expected quality audit process. 
	Ensure training partner adhere and deploy frontline training based on identified and signed-off training needs.


Coordinate scheduling, adherence and implementation of monthly job knowledge quiz:


	Coordinate scheduling, adherence and implementation of monthly Job Knowledge Quiz for frontline to continuously ascertain frontline skill/knowledge level. 
	Prepare Job Knowledge Quiz questions and ensure accuracy


Focus Group Support:


	Ensure the BPO participates in the focus group sessions 
	Escalate identified issues pending with Smartcash PSB 
	Give feedback on identified issues


Provide intelligence for the creation, modification or cleanup of call tagging categories on the CRM tool:


	Provide intelligence for the creation and cleanup of call tagging categories on CRM tool through intelligence gathered from call audits and calibration process.


Analysis and feedback on top call drivers and repeat call drivers:


	Analysis and feedback on top call drivers and repeat call drivers through intelligence gathered from sample audits. Initiatives on how to reduce top call drivers and repeat calls. 
	Engagement & conversion of Inactive customers and agents


Weekly and Monthly Reports:


	Reports on quality audits. 
	Top call drivers and cost analysis.
	Customer satisfaction report.
	Job knowledge quiz training need analysis
	Conducting effective resource planning and scheduling to maximize the productivity of resources (people, technology etc.)
	Retrieving of calls from ACR on demand for various analysis purposes.


Requirements
Educational Qualifications:


	B.A. or B.Sc in any discipline 


Relevant Experience & Functional / Technical Skills:


	Minimum of 5 years of Call Centre background in Banking/Telco/Service industry.
	Proficient in using customer service resolution tools (ACR, SV, ECMS, Maximus) 
	Strong numeric ability
	Knowledge of performance evaluation and customer service metrics 
	Strong Interpersonal Skills & People Centric. 
	Excellent organizational and leadership skills with a problem-solving ability 
	Effective communication skills
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Senior Project Risk Engineer",
  "description": "Vantegral Consulting - Our client is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Project Risk Engineer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	They are seeking an experienced Senior Project Risk Engineer to support risk identification, analysis, and management across major infrastructure and oil &amp; gas projects from design through commissioning.
	This role focuses on developing risk registers, conducting qualitative and quantitative risk assessments (including Monte Carlo simulations), and providing insights that support effective project delivery across scope, cost, schedule, and compliance.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Engineering, Construction Management, or related field
	8+ years of Experience in project risk / project controls (oil &amp; gas or infrastructure)
	Strong knowledge of project controls best practices
	Experience with Primavera P6, Primavera Risk Analysis &amp; Palisade @RISK
	Proven experience in qualitative and quantitative risk assessments
	Strong analytical, communication, and leadership skills
	&nbsp;Experience on large-scale construction or oil &amp; gas projects.
",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-11",

Senior Project Risk Engineer Job at Vantegral Consulting




        
    

        
        Vantegral Consulting - Our client is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Project Risk Engineer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	They are seeking an experienced Senior Project Risk Engineer to support risk identification, analysis, and management across major infrastructure and oil & gas projects from design through commissioning.
	This role focuses on developing risk registers, conducting qualitative and quantitative risk assessments (including Monte Carlo simulations), and providing insights that support effective project delivery across scope, cost, schedule, and compliance.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering, Construction Management, or related field
	8+ years of Experience in project risk / project controls (oil & gas or infrastructure)
	Strong knowledge of project controls best practices
	Experience with Primavera P6, Primavera Risk Analysis & Palisade @RISK
	Proven experience in qualitative and quantitative risk assessments
	Strong analytical, communication, and leadership skills
	 Experience on large-scale construction or oil & gas projects.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sourcing Manager (IT, Devices) & Cost Analyst",
  "description": "Airtel Nigeria (Airtel Networks Limited) is a leading telecommunications services provider in Nigeria headquartered in Lagos, the commercial nerve-centre of Nigeria. The telco ranks amongst the top four mobile service providers in terms of subscribers with a customer base of more than 39.8 million. The company&#39;s product offerings include 2G, 3G and 4G wireless services, mobile commerce and enterprise services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sourcing Manager (IT, Devices) &amp; Cost Analyst

Job Identification: 801
Job Location: Lagos
Job Schedule: Full time

About the Role


	To strategically source, manage and monitor the procurement of IT equipment, Commercial Inventory and related materials and services at the right price, right quantity, right lead-time &amp; quality from the most appropriate vendor at full cost of ownership to the benefit of Airtel to ensure good service delivery to its customers.
	Drive holistic cost efficiency, visibility and analysis across the organization.


Responsibilities
Procurement of IT Solutions, Hardware, Devices, SIM Cards and Services etc. both CAPEX and OPEX including Managed Services and&nbsp; &nbsp;AMCs. Ensure timely delivery of equipment and right quality:


	Releasing of RFI/RFQ/RFP for renewal of BPA/Rate contracts for IT Solutions, services, devices and Infrastructure items / equipment for the requirement of all over Airtel Networks Limited, Nigeria.&nbsp;
	Analyzing the RFP responses, price and lead time negotiations &amp; allocation of Business shares and necessary approvals from the management.&nbsp;
	Releasing &nbsp;Opex POs quarterly before start of quarter.


Overall Cost analytics and program management for cost efficiency across business:


	Overall spent analysis
	Cost risk and forecast
	Identifying cost efficiency opportunities
	Working with functions to define and running the cost efficiency program&nbsp;
	Operational and governance meetings&nbsp;
	Detailed analysis and management reporting&nbsp;


Contract Development and Management:


	Initiating and signing off contracts for new vendors, and ensuring that all existing contracts are renewed in timely manner before they expires.&nbsp;
	Awarding of rate contracts for IT equipment/services; controlling &amp; monitoring the use of rate contracts


Vendor Management:


	Identifying and developing new vendors.&nbsp;
	Periodic partner performance reviews &amp; SLA monitoring of passive vendors.


Cost optimization of all passive related Projects:


	Developing cost saving initiatives and collaborating with the user group in ensuring that all OPEX optimization strategies are implemented effectively through timely release of purchase order, contract renewal and release of payment.&nbsp;
	Reduction of diesel purchase price and driving down diesel volume through working OPEX devises.


Administrative Management:


	Managing the user group and Purchase Order creation team to raise PR
	Creating Purchase Order and ensuring that PR and PO are approved on a timely manner.


Reporting:


	Providing relevant reports on a monthly basis to aid book closure.


Audit Score: Improvement of Internal Audit score:


	Ensuring compliance to the sourcing processes.
	Assisting the Head of Sourcing in identifying and taking necessary corrections in gaps identified in internal control environment &nbsp;&nbsp;


Qualifications
Educational Qualifications:


	Bachelors in Engineering, Business, Science, Social Science or Related field&nbsp;
	Masters in Business Administration&nbsp;
	Chartered Institute of Purchasing and Supply Chain (Member)&nbsp;


Relevant Experience &amp; Functional / Technical Skills:


	Proven experience (8+ years) as a Sourcing/ Procurement Manager desirable in Technology industry or IT procurement
	Strong ethical skills
	Analytical skills
	Interpersonal skills and strong communication
	integrity&nbsp;
	Drive for result


Note: Airtel Africa is proud to be an equal opportunity employer and remain fully committed to diversity and inclusion in the workplace.",

Sourcing Manager (IT, Devices) & Cost Analyst Job at Airtel Nigeria




        
    

        
        Airtel Nigeria (Airtel Networks Limited) is a leading telecommunications services provider in Nigeria headquartered in Lagos, the commercial nerve-centre of Nigeria. The telco ranks amongst the top four mobile service providers in terms of subscribers with a customer base of more than 39.8 million. The company's product offerings include 2G, 3G and 4G wireless services, mobile commerce and enterprise services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sourcing Manager (IT, Devices) & Cost Analyst

Job Identification: 801
Job Location: Lagos
Job Schedule: Full time

About the Role
     

            
    




	To strategically source, manage and monitor the procurement of IT equipment, Commercial Inventory and related materials and services at the right price, right quantity, right lead-time & quality from the most appropriate vendor at full cost of ownership to the benefit of Airtel to ensure good service delivery to its customers.
	Drive holistic cost efficiency, visibility and analysis across the organization.


Responsibilities
Procurement of IT Solutions, Hardware, Devices, SIM Cards and Services etc. both CAPEX and OPEX including Managed Services and   AMCs. Ensure timely delivery of equipment and right quality:


	Releasing of RFI/RFQ/RFP for renewal of BPA/Rate contracts for IT Solutions, services, devices and Infrastructure items / equipment for the requirement of all over Airtel Networks Limited, Nigeria. 
	Analyzing the RFP responses, price and lead time negotiations & allocation of Business shares and necessary approvals from the management. 
	Releasing  Opex POs quarterly before start of quarter.


Overall Cost analytics and program management for cost efficiency across business:


	Overall spent analysis
	Cost risk and forecast
	Identifying cost efficiency opportunities
	Working with functions to define and running the cost efficiency program 
	Operational and governance meetings 
	Detailed analysis and management reporting 


Contract Development and Management:


	Initiating and signing off contracts for new vendors, and ensuring that all existing contracts are renewed in timely manner before they expires. 
	Awarding of rate contracts for IT equipment/services; controlling & monitoring the use of rate contracts


Vendor Management:


	Identifying and developing new vendors. 
	Periodic partner performance reviews & SLA monitoring of passive vendors.


Cost optimization of all passive related Projects:


	Developing cost saving initiatives and collaborating with the user group in ensuring that all OPEX optimization strategies are implemented effectively through timely release of purchase order, contract renewal and release of payment. 
	Reduction of diesel purchase price and driving down diesel volume through working OPEX devises.


Administrative Management:


	Managing the user group and Purchase Order creation team to raise PR
	Creating Purchase Order and ensuring that PR and PO are approved on a timely manner.


Reporting:


	Providing relevant reports on a monthly basis to aid book closure.


Audit Score: Improvement of Internal Audit score:


	Ensuring compliance to the sourcing processes.
	Assisting the Head of Sourcing in identifying and taking necessary corrections in gaps identified in internal control environment   


Qualifications
Educational Qualifications:


	Bachelors in Engineering, Business, Science, Social Science or Related field 
	Masters in Business Administration 
	Chartered Institute of Purchasing and Supply Chain (Member) 


Relevant Experience & Functional / Technical Skills:


	Proven experience (8+ years) as a Sourcing/ Procurement Manager desirable in Technology industry or IT procurement
	Strong ethical skills
	Analytical skills
	Interpersonal skills and strong communication
	integrity 
	Drive for result


Note: Airtel Africa is proud to be an equal opportunity employer and remain fully committed to diversity and inclusion in the workplace.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Tushiyah Luxury Homes
content:
Tushiyah Luxury Homes is a Real Estate company deliberate in moving families forward by providing affordable luxury to our customers. Tushiyah Luxury Homes is situated in Abuja Nigeria with Plot 762, The Ruby Centre Amino Kano Crescent as its address. Tushiyah Luxury Homes majors on sales and services, and sale of houses both in carcass state and completed state.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Sales Executive

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 
     

            
    




	Client Sourcing and Lead Generation: Proactively identifying, prospecting, and cultivating a high-net-worth network of potential buyers, corporate clients, and real estate investors through cold calling, networking, and digital outreach.
	Product Marketing and Promotion: Developing and executing strategic marketing presentations, showcasing the company's real estate portfolio, and representing the brand eloquently at corporate exhibitions, industry events, and site inspections.
	Property Inspections: Coordinating and leading physical and virtual site tours for prospective clients at our various estate locations, providing accurate layout and title information to convert interest into active buying intent.
	Closing Sales and Revenue Maximization: Facilitating negotiation processes, handling client objections, structuring payment schedules in alignment with company policy, and successfully closing high-value sales transactions to meet or exceed established monthly sales targets.
	Relationship Management: Maintaining strong post-sale relationships with clients to ensure customer satisfaction, manage payment collections for installment buyers, and secure repeat business or word-of-mouth referrals.


 Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 30th June, 2026.

Click here to apply online

 

2.) Legal Representative

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilties


	Prepare legal documents for the company
	Ensure andimplement compliance
	Other duties as assigned.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor’s Degree with 0 - 3 years of experience.


Salary
N1,200,000 annually.

Application Closing Date: 7th July, 2026.

Click here to apply online

 

3.) Marketer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Meet Sales targets
	Sales Lead generation
	Clients and prospects follow ups
	Weekly ?reports
	Closing deals
	Clients Appointments
	Site inspections.


Salary
N100,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 10th July, 2026.

Click here to apply online    

    

        Click here to Apply
